bird.name: 大红鹳
bird.summary: 大紅鸛（學名：Phoenicopterus roseus）是最廣泛分佈的火烈鳥。 特徵 大紅鸛是體型最大的火烈鳥，平均高1.1–1.5公尺，重2–4公斤。紀錄最大的雄鳥可以高達1.87公尺及重4.5公斤。牠們最為接近美洲紅鸛及智利火烈鳥，有時甚至被認為是同一物種。不過這個分類似…

locations.name: 旧大陆
locations.summary: 旧大陆（拉丁語：Mundus vetus）是指在克里斯托弗·哥伦布发现新大陆之前，欧洲所认识的世界，包括欧洲、亚洲和非洲（全体被称为亚欧非大陆或世界岛）。这个词语是用来與新大陆（包括北美洲，南美洲和大洋洲）相對應。 词源 在考古学和世界历…

locations.name: 北非

locations.name: 喜马拉雅山脉

locations.name: 中东

locations.name: 地中海
locations.summary: 地中海是一個位於歐洲南面、非洲北面以及亞洲西面的陸間海。东西长约4,000公里，南北最宽处大约为1,800公里，面積251.6万平方公里，是地球上最大的陸間海。地中海的平均深度是1,500米，最深處为5,267米。 地中海西部通过直布羅陀…

locations.name: 尼罗河
locations.summary: 尼罗河是一条流經非洲東北部的河流，自南向北流贯蘇丹草原和撒哈拉沙漠注入地中海，全長6650千米，是世界上最長的河流，流域面積334.9萬平方公里，占非洲大陆面积的九分之一以上。尼羅河的名字來自古希臘語Νεῖλος（Neilos），可能源於…

relations.subject: 大红鹳
relations.evidence: It is found in parts of Northern Africa (including coastal areas of northern Algeria, Egypt further inland along the Nile River, Libya, Morocco, and Tunisia), portions of Sub-Saharan Africa (Kenya, Madagascar, Rwanda, Tanzania, Uganda), Southern Asia (coastal Bangladesh, India, Pakistan, and Sri Lanka), the Western Asia (Bahrain, Cyprus, Iraq, Iran, Oman, Israel, Palestine, Kuwait, Lebanon, Qatar, and the United Arab Emirates) and Southern Europe (including Albania, Bulgaria, Croatia, France in the Camargue and Corsica, Greece, Italy, Slovenia, Malta, Monaco, Montenegro, North Macedonia, Portugal, Spain and the Balearic Islands, and Turkey). The most northern breeding spot is the Zwillbrocker Venn in western Germany, close to the border with the Netherlands

relations.evidence: It is found in parts of Northern Africa (including coastal areas of northern Algeria, Egypt further inland along the Nile River, Libya, Morocco, and Tunisia), portions of Sub-Saharan Africa (Kenya, Madagascar, Rwanda, Tanzania, Uganda), Southern Asia (coastal Bangladesh, India, Pakistan, and Sri Lanka), the Western Asia (Bahrain, Cyprus, Iraq, Iran, Oman, Israel, Palestine, Kuwait, Lebanon, Qatar, and the United Arab Emirates) and Southern Europe (including Albania, Bulgaria, Croatia, France in the Camargue and Corsica, Greece, Italy, Slovenia, Malta, Monaco, Montenegro, North Macedonia, Portugal, Spain and the Balearic Islands, and Turkey). The most northern breeding spot is the Zwillbrocker Venn in western Germany, close to the border with the Netherlands

relations.subject: 大红鹳
relations.evidence: The primary threats to flamingo populations are bacteria, toxins, and pollution in water supplies, which is usually run-off from manufacturing companies, and encroachment on their habitat
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
